name: maxwell_relations_thermodynamics

name: critical_point_scaling
nonlinear_optics_kerr_effect
description:
Kerr effect: refractive index change Δn = n2 * I
Returns (n_total, delta_n)
n0: linear refractive index
n2: nonlinear index coefficient (m^2/W)
intensity: optical intensity (W/m^2)

name: photonic_crystal_band_gap
description:
Rough estimate of the central frequency (first bandgap) in a 1D Bragg stack:
  lambda_center ≈ 2 * a * n_avg
central frequency f = c / lambda_center
where a is the lattice period (m) and n_high/n_low are refractive indices of layers.
This is an estimate for the stop-band center.
Returns a dict with central wavelength and frequency.

name: photonic_crystal_band_gap

name: laser_threshold_condition
description:
Laser threshold gain approximation:
  g_th = (1/(2L)) * ln(1 / (R1 * R2)) + alpha_internal
L: cavity length (m)
R1,R2: mirror power reflectivities (0..1)
alpha_internal: internal loss (1/m)
Returns threshold gain (1/m).

name: metamaterial_negative_index
description:
Effective refractive index n_eff = sqrt(eps_eff * mu_eff)
Returns (n_eff, is_negative_index) where is_negative_index is True if both real parts negative.
eps_eff, mu_eff: complex or real effective permittivity/permeability

name: metamaterial_negative_index
description:

formula: re_n = n_eff.real if hasattr(n_eff, 'real') else float(n_eff)

name: dna_melting_temperature
description:
Approximate DNA melting temperature (Tm).
If seq_or_length is a string (DNA sequence), use either Wallace rule (short sequences)
or a simple empirical long-sequence formula:
  - For length < 14: Wallace rule Tm = 2*(A+T) + 4*(G+C) (°C)
  - For longer sequences: Tm = 81.5 + 0.41*(%GC) - 675/length + 16.6*log10([Na+])
na_conc: sodium concentration in M (default 0.05 M)
Returns Tm in degrees Celsius.

name: enzyme_kinetics_competitive_inhibition
description:
Michaelis-Menten rate with competitive inhibitor:
  v = Vmax * [S] / (Km * (1 + [I]/Ki) + [S])
Vmax: maximum rate
Km: Michaelis constant
S: substrate concentration
I: inhibitor concentration
Ki: inhibitor dissociation constant

name: black_scholes_greeks_comprehensive
description:
Compute Black-Scholes price and Greeks for a European call or put.
Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)
  r: risk-free rate (annual)
  sigma: volatility (annual)
  option_type: 'call' or 'put'
Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

name: black_scholes_greeks_comprehensive
formula: d1 = (math.log(S / K) + (r + 0.5 * sigma * sigma) * T) / (sigma * math.sqrt(T))
description:
Compute Black-Scholes price and Greeks for a European call or put.
Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)
  r: risk-free rate (annual)
  sigma: volatility (annual)
  option_type: 'call' or 'put'
Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

name: black_scholes_greeks_comprehensive
description:
Compute Black-Scholes price and Greeks for a European call or put.
Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)

Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

name: black_scholes_greeks_comprehensive
formula: price = S * Nd1 - K * math.exp(-r * T) * Nd2
description:
Compute Black-Scholes price and Greeks for a European call or put.
Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)
  r: risk-free rate (annual)
  sigma: volatility (annual)
  option_type: 'call' or 'put'
Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

name: black_scholes_greeks_comprehensive
description:
Compute Black-Scholes price and Greeks for a European call or put.
Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)
  r: risk-free rate (annual)
  sigma: volatility (annual)
  option_type: 'call' or 'put'
Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

name: black_scholes_greeks_comprehensive
formula: theta = -S * n_d1 * sigma / (2.0 * math.sqrt(T)) - r * K * math.exp(-r * T) * Nd2
description:
Compute Black-Scholes price and Greeks for a European call or put.
Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)
  r: risk-free rate (annual)
  sigma: volatility (annual)
  option_type: 'call' or 'put'
Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

name: black_scholes_greeks_comprehensive
formula: rho = K * T * math.exp(-r * T) * Nd2
description:
Compute Black-Scholes price and Greeks for a European call or put.
Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)
  r: risk-free rate (annual)
  sigma: volatility (annual)
  option_type: 'call' or 'put'
Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

description:

Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)
  r: risk-free rate (annual)
  sigma: volatility (annual)
  option_type: 'call' or 'put'
Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

name: black_scholes_greeks_comprehensive
description:
Compute Black-Scholes price and Greeks for a European call or put.
Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)
  r: risk-free rate (annual)
  sigma: volatility (annual)
  option_type: 'call' or 'put'
Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

name: black_scholes_greeks_comprehensive
formula: price = K * math.exp(-r * T) * Nd2m - S * Nd1m
description:
Compute Black-Scholes price and Greeks for a European call or put.
Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)
  r: risk-free rate (annual)
  sigma: volatility (annual)
  option_type: 'call' or 'put'
Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

name: black_scholes_greeks_comprehensive
description:
Compute Black-Scholes price and Greeks for a European call or put.
Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)
  r: risk-free rate (annual)
  sigma: volatility (annual)
  option_type: 'call' or 'put'
Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

name: black_scholes_greeks_comprehensive
formula: theta = -S * n_d1 * sigma / (2.0 * math.sqrt(T)) + r * K * math.exp(-r * T) * Nd2m
description:
Compute Black-Scholes price and Greeks for a European call or put.
Inputs:
  S: spot price
  K: strike
  T: time to maturity in years (if T==0 returns intrinsic values)
  r: risk-free rate (annual)
  sigma: volatility (annual)
  option_type: 'call' or 'put'
Returns dict with price, delta, gamma, vega, theta, rho.

name: value_at_risk_monte_carlo
description:
Monte Carlo VaR assuming geometric Brownian motion model for portfolio returns or simple normal returns.
portfolio_value: current portfolio value (currency)
mu: expected daily return (decimal)
sigma: daily volatility (decimal)
horizon_days: days to hold
sims: number of Monte Carlo simulations
conf_level: e.g., 0.95 for 95% VaR
Returns VaR (positive number indicating loss) and the returns distribution percentile.
